title: VP Candidacy Age Limit Controversy
description: Constitutional Court adjusted age requirement enabling Gibran's VP candidacy, raising widespread nepotism concerns. The court chief justice is Jokowi's brother-in-law.

title: Solo Mayor Election Fast-Track
description: Gibran's rapid rise from businessman to Solo mayor candidate within months raised questions about political dynasticism.

title: Infrastructure Development in Solo
description: Gibran continued Jokowi's infrastructure-focused governance style during his tenure as Solo mayor, receiving positive reviews.

title: PSI Consistent Support for Jokowi Agenda
description: PSI consistently supported Jokowi's legislative agenda in parliament including the omnibus law.

title: PSI Leadership Controversy
description: PSI's close association with Jokowi raised concerns about independence and democratic party governance.

title: Controversial Mining Permits
description: Bahlil's ministry issued mining permits that critics linked to political patronage networks within Jokowi's coalition.

title: Energy Transition Initiatives
description: Bahlil promoted renewable energy transition policies aligned with Jokowi's international climate commitments.

title: Police Neutrality Concerns
description: Listyo Sigit's appointment and subsequent actions during 2024 election raised concerns about police neutrality in favor of Jokowi-backed candidates.

title: Gerindra Election Victory 2024
description: Gerindra successfully backed Prabowo's presidential campaign, winning the 2024 election decisively.

title: Campaign Financing Support
description: Hashim provided significant financial backing for Prabowo's presidential campaigns across multiple election cycles.
